creator: loic.blot@unix-experience.fr
text:
Created attachment 163539
update_to_2.1.path

Elasticsearch 2.1 was released today.
This patch upgrade textproc/elasticsearch2 and fix a JAVA_HOME problem due to incorrect $PATH when calling the /usr/local/lib/elasticsearch/bin/elasticsearch script by adding /usr/local/bin, permitting to discover openjdk7/8 installations.
